EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IXMLTypeMapper

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that convert to and from XML to native types.

[Guid("A9A5DE92-E3C9-4940-B0F4-6D93CDF2602B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IXMLTypeMapper

Methods

FromBinary(ref byte[])

Converts a byte array to an XML byte array.

string FromBinary(ref byte[] Value)

Parameters

Value byte[]

Returns

string
